titleStmt.title: SII 15.33: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 33. (B.K. No. 53 of 1927-28.) BŪDIHĀḶ, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in the Īśvara temple.

This is dated the Jagadēkamalla year (not specified), Prabhava, Chaitra śu • • Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. The date is incomplete and the said Saṁkramaṇa is obviously a mistake. The approximate equivalent of the date would be 1147 A.D., March.

It registers a gift of land for worship, offerings, etc., to the god Kalidēva, when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kuppadēvarasa of the Yādava lineage was governing Māsavāḍi Hundred and Forty. Sōma-gāvuṇḍa who seems to have been connected with the benefaction is praised. The inscription is damaged and some of the relevant details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . dēvarājanatastutyaṁ marutānaṁda bhu
ta kalidēva namaḥ śivāya
svasti śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēva vija
ya rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi svastisamadhigata paṁcamahāśa
bda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ vīralakṣmīkāntaṁ suva
¨rṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvare kuppadēvarasaru
damaged
riya tiḷakaṁ ge sadguṇaṁ nripanaṁ śaraṇā
daḍe kū¨rttu jagadoḷe tāne dharāgra
namāḍidō . [Aṁtu] mūsavāḍinūṟa nālvattumaṁ pāḷisi
yuṁ parama ḷasādhakanappa duṣṭa niṣṭhura siṣṭō
ddhāraṇādi
cakānicaya raci bagedā na parākra
manu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . Ātana maṁḍa
ḷadūḷage khyātigesadi¨rppa grāmaṁ guṇaniḷaya
vīra bhūtaḷa lli . gaḍiyaṁkamalla
biruduṁ koṁḍa sāhasabhīmaṁ nuḍidaṁte
gaṁḍa raṇadaḍeyoḷu . ©
Ātana taṁmmana pēḷvaḍe bhūteḷa kuppa ripugaṁ Ātana ta
nūbhavanenisida nūtana gauṁḍana śau¨ryya . ©
Uṟadiṁtu ku ripunriparaśarabhanādaṁ deḍeyā
ḷu sau¨ryyadoḷ sōmagauṁḍa .
Aṁtavari¨rbbaruṁ ḍaṁge puṭṭi nijakuḷa nagēṁdradyu
maṇiyenisida rāmalakṣmaṇaguṇasaṁmōditarāgi su
pratīka saucācāradiṁ sukhadinire .
mattameṁtene . ka . duddharisaleṁdu
kamaḷōdbhavanu rājya vātana nisikalpa
bhūja paṁkajada gaurava
mā sasigā sudhāṁsu dārada
vasu mauktikaṁ misu puṭṭidaneṁbina cinniseṭṭigaṁ
sasimukhi rēvakabbegaṁ puṭṭe baṁmaṇaṁ . Ātena taṁmaṁ
parahitacaritaṁ satyasaucabratadiṁ surana
diya suta jakkaṁ nuḍi sa
tyavāgi maṁnnisi da¨rtthanicaya tanabhimānadhanaṁ naḍa
vaḷi dha¨rmma sāraṁ tri
va¨rgga saṁśritasāraṁ sāraṁ sa
dbudhagōṣṭi nivārita na kulada
damaged
gāvuṁḍaṁ sōmagāvuṁḍa
svasti śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvava¨rṣada prabhava saṁvatsarada cai
tra suddha vāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti bya
tīpāta pratiṣṭayaṁ māḍida kalidēva
svāmi seṭṭiya nivēdyakkaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁ
ḍasphuṭita jī¨rnnōddhārada besakkaṁ saṁpū¨rṇnavāgi koṭṭa bhū
mi mūḍalu yiṁmmattarenalu
paḍuvalu leraḍu naṭṭa kallu mēre teṁkalu naṭṭa kallu mē
re baḍagalu naṭṭa kallu mēre yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁdoḷage matta
raiya ttu I dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru gāvuṁḍugaḷu .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
